items.title: Anthropic hit with largest-ever $1.5 billion penalty in copyright lawsuit — court says training AI on published material is fair use, but startup’s pirated library infringes on authors’ rights
items.summary: The settlement was finally approved by a U.S. federal judge, with a majority of the plaintiffs accepting the amount. A few members of the group refused, citing the small amount compared to the number of infringed titles, and are pursuing a separate lawsuit of their own.
items.title_original: Anthropic hit with largest-ever $1.5 billion penalty in copyright lawsuit — court says training AI on published material is fair use, but startup’s pirated library infringes on authors’ rights
items.title_en: Anthropic hit with largest-ever $1.5 billion penalty in copyright lawsuit — court says training AI on published material is fair use, but startup’s pirated library infringes on authors’ rights
items.title_bilingual: Anthropic hit with largest-ever $1.5 billion penalty in copyright lawsuit — court says training AI on published material is fair use, but startup’s pirated library infringes on authors’ rights
items.summary_zh: 该和解协议最终获得美国联邦法官的批准，大多数原告接受了该金额。该组织的一些成员拒绝了，理由是与侵权作品的数量相比，金额很小，并正在单独提起诉讼。

items.title: Intel to co-develop and manufacture Fortinet's next-gen firewall ASIC on Intel 4 — node gets its first named external customer

items.title: Z.ai powers up a 1-gigawatt AI data center built entirely on Chinese chips, report claims — GLM developer now runs multiple 10,000-chip clusters with zero Nvidia silicon
items.summary: Chinese AI developer Z.ai (formerly Zhipu) has finished building a 1GW data center stocked exclusively with domestically made chips and has switched part of it on.
items.title_original: Z.ai powers up a 1-gigawatt AI data center built entirely on Chinese chips, report claims — GLM developer now runs multiple 10,000-chip clusters with zero Nvidia silicon
items.title_en: Z.ai powers up a 1-gigawatt AI data center built entirely on Chinese chips, report claims — GLM developer now runs multiple 10,000-chip clusters with zero Nvidia silicon
items.title_bilingual: Z.ai powers up a 1-gigawatt AI data center built entirely on Chinese chips, report claims — GLM developer now runs multiple 10,000-chip clusters with zero Nvidia silicon
items.summary_zh: 中国人工智能开发商Z.ai（原智浦）已经完成了一座1GW的数据中心的建设，该数据中心全部采用国产芯片，并已部分启用。

items.title: TSMC eyes price hikes of up to 25% on chip production services in 2027, report claims — plans to raise baseline prices by 5% to 10% on advanced nodes
items.summary: TSMC reportedly intends to increase prices of wafers it processes citing demand, rising costs, and increased investments in new capacity.
items.title_original: TSMC eyes price hikes of up to 25% on chip production services in 2027, report claims — plans to raise baseline prices by 5% to 10% on advanced nodes
items.title_en: TSMC eyes price hikes of up to 25% on chip production services in 2027, report claims — plans to raise baseline prices by 5% to 10% on advanced nodes
items.title_bilingual: TSMC eyes price hikes of up to 25% on chip production services in 2027, report claims — plans to raise baseline prices by 5% to 10% on advanced nodes
items.summary_zh: 据报道，台积电打算提高其加工晶圆的价格，理由是需求、成本上升以及新产能投资的增加。

items.title: Intel layoffs to hit Data Center group — division focused on server CPUs, AI chips, and data center architecture to be hit by an unknown number of cuts
items.summary: Intel plans to cut the employee numbers of its Data Center group, months after announcing record growth since its disastrous announcement in 2024.
items.title_original: Intel layoffs to hit Data Center group — division focused on server CPUs, AI chips, and data center architecture to be hit by an unknown number of cuts
items.title_en: Intel layoffs to hit Data Center group — division focused on server CPUs, AI chips, and data center architecture to be hit by an unknown number of cuts
items.title_bilingual: Intel layoffs to hit Data Center group — division focused on server CPUs, AI chips, and data center architecture to be hit by an unknown number of cuts
items.summary_zh: 英特尔计划削减其数据中心部门的员工人数，数月前该部门宣布自 2024 年灾难性公告以来该部门的员工人数创历史新高。

items.title: SMIC's third-gen 7nm node shows smaller metal pitch than Intel 18A, higher transistor density than TSMC N6 without EUV — analysis of N+3 shows significant advancement for Chinese semi manufacturing
items.summary: SMIC's N+3 process technology can achieve transistor density comparable to TSMC's N6 without using EUV lithography, but it fails to deliver performance or efficiency of modern production nodes.
items.title_original: SMIC's third-gen 7nm node shows smaller metal pitch than Intel 18A, higher transistor density than TSMC N6 without EUV — analysis of N+3 shows significant advancement for Chinese semi manufacturing
items.title_en: SMIC's third-gen 7nm node shows smaller metal pitch than Intel 18A, higher transistor density than TSMC N6 without EUV — analysis of N+3 shows significant advancement for Chinese semi manufacturing
items.title_bilingual: SMIC's third-gen 7nm node shows smaller metal pitch than Intel 18A, higher transistor density than TSMC N6 without EUV — analysis of N+3 shows significant advancement for Chinese semi manufacturing
items.summary_zh: 中芯国际的N+3工艺技术可以在不使用EUV光刻的情况下实现与台积电N6相当的晶体管密度，但它无法提供现代生产节点的性能或效率。

items.title: Google reportedly developing 'Frozen v2' chip with Gemini's architecture etched into the silicon — engineers project 6 to 10 times more tokens per watt than latest TPUs
items.summary: Google is developing a server chip, informally dubbed "Frozen v2," that would etch part of its Gemini model's architecture directly into the silicon.
items.title_original: Google reportedly developing 'Frozen v2' chip with Gemini's architecture etched into the silicon — engineers project 6 to 10 times more tokens per watt than latest TPUs
items.title_en: Google reportedly developing 'Frozen v2' chip with Gemini's architecture etched into the silicon — engineers project 6 to 10 times more tokens per watt than latest TPUs
items.title_bilingual: Google reportedly developing 'Frozen v2' chip with Gemini's architecture etched into the silicon — engineers project 6 to 10 times more tokens per watt than latest TPUs
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在开发一种服务器芯片，非正式地称为“Frozen v2”，它将将其 Gemini 模型的部分架构直接蚀刻到硅中。

items.title: PC modder bolts 5.5-pound aluminum heatsink to RTX 4060 — convection-only cooling seems to work fine in a testbench-style installation
items.summary: A PC gamer has DIYed a passive Nvidia GeForce RTX 4060 graphics card system incorporating a 5.5-pound aluminum heatsink.
items.title_original: PC modder bolts 5.5-pound aluminum heatsink to RTX 4060 — convection-only cooling seems to work fine in a testbench-style installation
items.title_en: PC modder bolts 5.5-pound aluminum heatsink to RTX 4060 — convection-only cooling seems to work fine in a testbench-style installation
items.title_bilingual: PC modder bolts 5.5-pound aluminum heatsink to RTX 4060 — convection-only cooling seems to work fine in a testbench-style installation
items.summary_zh: 一位 PC 游戏玩家 DIY 了一个被动式 Nvidia GeForce RTX 4060 显卡系统，该系统配有 5.5 磅重的铝制散热器。

items.title: Nvidia's new Synthetic Video Detector can identify fake AI videos with up to 92% accuracy — microservice based on cutting-edge research looks to combat misinformation in broadcasts with just 22ms processing time
items.summary: Nvidia has just created an antidote to the virus that is AI misinformation. The company's new Synthetic Video Detector can help broadcasters assess 1080p footage at scale with processing times of just 22ms and up 92% accuracy for uncompressed videos.
items.title_original: Nvidia's new Synthetic Video Detector can identify fake AI videos with up to 92% accuracy — microservice based on cutting-edge research looks to combat misinformation in broadcasts with just 22ms processing time
items.title_en: Nvidia's new Synthetic Video Detector can identify fake AI videos with up to 92% accuracy — microservice based on cutting-edge research looks to combat misinformation in broadcasts with just 22ms processing time
items.title_bilingual: Nvidia's new Synthetic Video Detector can identify fake AI videos with up to 92% accuracy — microservice based on cutting-edge research looks to combat misinformation in broadcasts with just 22ms processing time
items.summary_zh: 英伟达刚刚创造了一种病毒的解药，那就是人工智能错误信息。该公司的新型合成视频检测器可以帮助广播公司大规模评估 1080p 素材，处理时间仅为 22 毫秒，未压缩视频的准确度高达 92%。

items.title: The enduring paradox of the AI economy — models get better and more efficient, yet costs can still easily spiral out of control
items.summary: Token amplification creates a paradox in the AI economy, as more capable models beget more complicated tasks.

items.title_en: The enduring paradox of the AI economy — models get better and more efficient, yet costs can still easily spiral out of control

items.summary_zh: 代币放大在人工智能经济中造成了一个悖论，因为更强大的模型会产生更复杂的任务。

items.title: Taiwan indicts ex-TSMC manager for allegedly stealing chip secrets for China — first case of its kind links managers to Chinese semiconductor materials analysis company
